ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR (SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

(SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: FILED BY ON MAR-13-2018 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF JAQUELINE TSANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAWLOR CONTRACTORS IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARGARET LAWLOR, PAINTER. DEFENDANT HAS BEEN MAKING THE MONTHLY PAYMENTS AS ORDERED ON 10/5/2017. NEW ORDER FOR PAYMENT PLAN ISSUED BY HONORABLE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS ON OPEN RECORD.
